legal.privacyWhoWeAreDesc: {company}, registered in Spain, contact email hola@mgic.app, is the entity responsible for processing your personal data through this platform.
legal.privacyDataCollectedDesc: We collect the following information when you create an account or use our services:
legal.privacyDataPayment: Payment information (processed by Stripe, we do not store card data)
legal.privacyDataDevice: Technical browsing data (IP address, device type, browser language)
legal.privacyLegalBasisDesc: We process your data based on:
legal.privacyLegalBasisContract: Contract performance: to manage your account, bookings, payments and subscriptions.
legal.privacyLegalBasisConsent: Consent: for sending push notifications and optional marketing communications.
legal.privacyLegalBasisLegitimate: Legitimate interest: to improve the platform, prevent fraud and ensure service security.
legal.privacyLegalBasisLegal: Legal obligation: to comply with applicable tax and legal obligations.
legal.privacyPurposeBookings: Manage your class bookings and packages
legal.privacyPurposeComms: Send you confirmations, reminders and studio notifications
legal.privacyPurposeImprove: Improve the platform experience and develop new features
legal.privacyPurposeSupport: Respond to your inquiries and provide technical support
legal.privacySharingDesc: When you register at a studio through the platform, your profile data (name, email, phone, booking and attendance history) is shared with that studio so they can manage your relationship as a client: contact you, manage your bookings, handle check-in and provide a personalized service. Each studio only has access to the data of its own clients.
legal.privacySharingProvidersDesc: We share data with the following service providers who act as data processors under our instructions:
legal.privacySharingSupabase: Supabase Inc. (USA) — file and image storage
legal.privacySharingNoSell: We do not sell or transfer your personal information to third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.privacyTransfersDesc: Some of our service providers (Stripe, Resend, Supabase) are located in the United States. These transfers are carried out under the safeguards established by the GDPR, including Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission and/or the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
legal.privacyRetentionDesc: We retain your personal data for as long as you maintain an active account on the platform. Once you request account deletion, your data will be deleted or anonymized within a maximum of 30 days, unless there is a legal obligation to retain it (e.g., tax data for the legally established period).
legal.privacyCookiesDesc: We use only essential cookies to keep your session active, remember your language preferences and ensure the platform functions properly. We do not use advertising tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
legal.privacyRightsDesc: Under the GDPR and LOPDGDD, you have the right to:
legal.privacyRightsAccess: Access: request a copy of your personal data.
legal.privacyRightsRectify: Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
legal.privacyRightsDelete: Erasure: request the deletion of your data.
legal.privacyRightsPortability: Portability: receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
legal.privacyRightsObject: Object: object to the processing of your data for reasons related to your particular situation.
legal.privacyRightsRestrict: Restriction: request the restriction of processing in certain circumstances.
legal.privacyRightsExercise: You can exercise these rights by contacting us at hola@mgic.app or from the profile section of the platform.
legal.privacyAuthorityDesc: If you consider that the processing of your data does not comply with regulations, you may file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
legal.privacyContactDesc: For any privacy inquiries, contact {company} at hola@mgic.app.
legal.termsAcceptanceDesc: By creating an account or using the services operated by {company}, you accept these terms of service in full. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.
legal.termsServiceDesc: {company} provides a technology platform that enables fitness, wellness and sports studios to manage bookings, packages, subscriptions and payments. The content, quality and availability of classes is the sole responsibility of each studio.
legal.termsAccountDesc: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and the confidentiality of your access credentials. You must not share your account with third parties. You must provide accurate information and keep it up to date.
legal.termsBookingsDesc: When booking a class, you accept the following conditions:
legal.termsBookingsCancel: You can cancel your booking up to 12 hours before the class to recover your credit.
legal.termsBookingsCredits: Cancellations outside the allowed window do not generate credit refunds.
legal.termsBookingsNoShow: No-show without prior cancellation may result in the loss of the credit used.
legal.termsPaymentsDesc: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. Prices are displayed in the currency configured by the studio. Subscriptions renew automatically according to the contracted period. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your profile; the cancellation will take effect at the end of the current period.
legal.termsWithdrawalDesc: In accordance with European regulations, you have 14 calendar days from the date of purchase to exercise your right of withdrawal, unless you have consumed the service (attended a class or used credits), in which case it is understood that you have expressly waived this right.
legal.termsConductDesc: You agree to use the platform respectfully and in accordance with the law. Any fraudulent, abusive use or interference with the normal operation of the service is prohibited. The studio and {company} reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that violate these rules.
legal.termsIntellectualDesc: All elements of the platform (code, design, trademarks, logos) are the property of {company} or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. No usage rights are granted beyond access to the service.
legal.termsLiabilityDesc: {company} acts as a technology provider and is not responsible for activities carried out at studios. Participants attend classes at their own risk and should inform the instructor about relevant medical conditions. {company} is not liable for indirect damages, loss of profits or service interruptions due to causes beyond its control.
legal.termsChangesDesc: We may modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified by email at least 15 days in advance. Continued use of the service after the modifications take effect implies acceptance.
legal.termsLawDesc: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute that cannot be resolved amicably, both parties submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Madrid, unless consumer protection regulations establish a different venue.
legal.termsContactDesc: For inquiries about these terms, contact {company} at hola@mgic.app.
legal.cookieMessage: We use essential cookies to keep the platform running properly and remember your preferences.

meta.title: Mgic Studio — The all-in-one platform for boutique fitness studios
meta.description: Replace 10 tools with one. Mgic is the modern studio management platform that handles scheduling, payments, member engagement, AI insights, and community — so you can focus on what you love.
meta.ogDescription: Replace 10 tools with one. Scheduling, payments, community, AI — all in Mgic.

hero.subtitle: Scheduling, payments, member engagement, AI insights, and community — all in one platform designed for studios that refuse to settle.

whyMgic.label: Why Mgic
whyMgic.subtitle: One platform that actually replaces the ten you're juggling today.

tabs.title: Smart Scheduling
tabs.headline: A schedule that fills itself
tabs.description: Drag-and-drop weekly view, recurring classes, waitlists that auto-promote, and coach availability management — all connected. Members see real-time spots, book instantly, and get reminded automatically.

tabs.title: Payments & Packages
tabs.headline: Get paid without chasing anyone
tabs.description: Stripe-powered payments, class packs, recurring memberships, auto-retry on failed charges, and a complete financial dashboard. See MRR, forecast renewals, and export everything in one click.

tabs.title: Member Management
tabs.headline: Know every member by name — and by data
tabs.description: Full CRM with risk detection, engagement insights, and lifecycle tracking. See who's at risk of churning, who your top members are, and who just needs a nudge to come back.
features: Smart filters: active, at-risk, new, expiring

tabs.title: Coach Tools
tabs.headline: Your coaches deserve better than a spreadsheet
tabs.description: Each coach gets their own dashboard with class stats, earnings breakdowns, fan rankings, and availability management. Configure flexible pay rates — per class, per student, or tiered by occupancy.
features: Flexible pay: fixed, per-class, per-student, tiered

tabs.title: Marketing & Growth
tabs.headline: Turn every class into a growth engine
tabs.description: UTM-tracked links, QR codes, Instagram integration, referral programs, and promotional highlights — all built in. Track which campaigns drive actual bookings, not just clicks.

memberApp.subtitle: A branded PWA your members will actually love — booking, social, achievements, and community, no App Store needed.
memberApp.tryCta: Try the Mgic Member App now
memberApp.pwaNote: Progressive Web App — works on any device, no download required

mgicAi.label: MgicAI
mgicAi.titleStart: AI that runs your front desk
mgicAi.subtitle: Powered by Claude, MgicAI is your always-on studio assistant. It doesn't just answer questions — it surfaces the insights you didn't know you needed.

capabilities.title: Smart Briefings
capabilities.desc: Start every day with AI-generated insights on your bookings, revenue, and member activity.

capabilities.title: Churn Prediction
capabilities.desc: MgicAI flags at-risk members before they leave, so you can reach out at the right moment.

capabilities.title: Revenue Forecasting
capabilities.desc: See where your revenue is heading based on renewals, failed payments, and booking trends.

capabilities.title: Class Optimization
capabilities.desc: Get recommendations on scheduling, capacity, and pricing based on real occupancy data.

mgicAi.chatPlaceholder: Ask MgicAI anything about your studio...

dashboard.subtitle: One platform to run scheduling, memberships, payments, staff, and analytics. No add-ons, no integrations, no surprises.
dashboard.featuresTitle: Everything you need for seamless studio operations

social.label: Social & Community
social.subtitle: The social layer that turns solo workouts into shared experiences. Friends, kudos, achievements, and a feed that keeps members coming back.

cards.title: Friend Discovery
cards.desc: Suggest friends based on shared classes. Members who train together, stay together.

cards.title: Kudos & Reactions
cards.desc: Celebrate wins with fire reactions, comments, and shout-outs — just like Strava.

cards.title: Gamification Engine
cards.desc: Tiers, badges, and auto-rewards that drive real retention. Configure levels, triggers, and prizes.

cards.title: Wearable Connect
cards.desc: Apple Watch & Strava integration — share real workout data directly in the feed.

cards.title: Referral Program
cards.desc: Personal codes, tracking dashboard, reward queue — turn your best members into ambassadors.

cards.title: Notify Me
cards.desc: Members get instant alerts when a spot opens in a full class — no more manual checking.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All plans include updates, hosting, and support.
pricing.footerNote: All plans include updates, hosting, and support. No hidden fees.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For new studios getting off the ground.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For studios ready to scale and retain.
plans.highlight: The AI assistant from Momence costs $399/mo as an add-on. Here it's included.

switching.subtitleEnd: . That's why we built our process to eliminate disruption, member confusion, and extra work for your team.

main.title: Your data, our promise
main.desc: Your switching concerns are valid. That's why our team spends 4 weeks preparing for one perfect night. We move your business to Mgic overnight with zero downtime, zero disruption, zero stress.

owners.title: For studio owners, by studio owners
owners.desc: We listen and act like your partner. We ship updates every week based on what studios like yours actually need.

support.title: Customer for life philosophy
support.desc: Video call support from product experts whenever you and your team need it. Enterprise-grade security standards.

aiDesk.title: AI frontdesk — MgicAI
aiDesk.desc: Stop training staff who leave in six months. Let AI handle inquiries, member insights, and business intelligence automatically.

buyout.title: Contract buyout
buyout.desc: Don't stay stuck with outdated or overpriced software. We offer full contract buyouts for all fitness studios. Switch risk-free.

items.q: How long does it take to set up Mgic?
items.a: Most studios are up and running in under 30 minutes. We handle data migration from your current platform, and our team walks you through every step. No technical skills required.

items.q: Do my members need to download an app?
items.a: Nope. Mgic's member app is a Progressive Web App (PWA) — members just visit your branded link and add it to their home screen. Looks and feels native, no App Store needed.

items.q: What payment processor do you use?
items.a: We use Stripe Connect for secure, global payment processing. Your members can pay with credit cards, and you get payouts directly to your bank account. We never hold your money.

items.q: Can I manage multiple studio locations?
items.a: Absolutely. Our Scale plan includes full multi-studio management — separate rooms, coaches, and schedules per location, all controlled from one dashboard.

MgicAI is powered by Claude and analyzes your studio data in real time. It generates daily briefings, flags at-risk members, forecasts revenue, and answers questions about your business in natural language. Available on Growth and Scale plans.

items.q: What makes the social features different from just having a WhatsApp group?
items.a: Mgic's social layer is built into the booking experience. Members see what friends are booking, give kudos after classes, celebrate achievements, and discover new friends through shared sessions. It's contextual, not just chat.

items.q: Do you integrate with ClassPass or Gympass?
items.a: Yes. Our Scale plan includes full integration with ClassPass and Gympass — manage quotas, handle check-ins, export reconciliation data, and track which external bookings convert to members.

items.q: Is there a contract or commitment?
items.a: No contracts, ever. All plans are month-to-month. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime. We believe the product should earn your business every month.

darkCta.subtitle: Start your free trial today — no credit card, no commitment. We'll help you set up your studio on Mgic in minutes.
darkCta.footNote: 14-day free trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for boutique fitness studios.
